completion_items.detail: Supported: Structured runtime messages and run-log records.

completion_items.detail: Internal: Internal data-driven modeling vocabulary, target contracts, model specs, and model-card artifacts.

completion_items.detail: Native: Live HTTP(S) GET/download execution plus POST/PUT/PATCH request bodies and pinned offline/cache HTTP(S) boundary records with redacted Secret[T] query values, SHA-256 checks, and artifact summaries.
